finality_scope: Physical Quantum Qi v0.2 deepening modules including SK/FV Qi action v0.2A, Ward/leak identity v0.2B, DPI recoverability v0.2C, IndraNet gauge transport v0.2D, IndraNet PlanOS handoff v0.2D, Qi non-Markov memory v0.2E, Qi Process Tensor v0.2F, Qi Process Tensor conventional autonomy v0.2G, Qi OS handoff, Qi OS bridge packet, and Qi MemoryOS record candidate
